provenance.source_corpus: Telemetry-Determined Habitat Use Informs Multi-Species Habitat Management in an Urban Harbour

source_spans.text: Daily site fidelity was influenced by habitat restoration and its interactions with species and body size, as well as season and its interactions with species and body size.

nodes.name: Increased daily site fidelity for Yellow Perch

source_spans.text: Daily site fidelity was higher in restored sites compared to non-restored sites for Yellow Perch and Northern Pike, but lower for Largemouth Bass and Common Carp.

nodes.name: Increased daily site fidelity for Northern Pike

source_spans.text: Daily site fidelity was higher in restored sites compared to non-restored sites for Yellow Perch and Northern Pike, but lower for Largemouth Bass and Common Carp.

nodes.name: Decreased daily site fidelity for Largemouth Bass

nodes.name: Decreased daily site fidelity for Common Carp
